calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-1'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default And Default Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
